creator: freebsd@phil.spodhuis.org
text:
Commit 9024ea4ea906 of the Ports tree landed 6 days ago, overhauling graphics/netpbm.  The commit message states:

    - Headers have been moved to ${LOCALBASE}/include/netpbm.  Fix ports
      that expect them to be in ${LOCALBASE}/include

That commit missed graphics/gts which, with `NETPBM` option on, depends upon netpbm and errors out during build with:

happrox.c:24:10: fatal error: 'pgm.h' file not found
#include <pgm.h>

That file is one of those which moved.

Changing graphics/gts/Makefile to edit CPPFLAGS worked for my use-case of getting local poudriere building again, but should probably be done "right" as USE-flag dependent.
